---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error or incorrect information in the guide
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug or error.

## Location

- Section: [e.g., Tables, Code Blocks]
- Line number (if applicable):

## Expected Behavior

What should the correct information or rendering be?

## Actual Behavior

What is currently shown or happening?

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
